summary: Partner Billing & Partner Admin Access testing completed. All 14 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend verified - White Label Partners page shows Billing button for each partner, Partner Billing page loads correctly with Partner Summary, Platform Billing (super admin), and Client Billing sections.
critical_code_review_comments: RBAC get_user_partner_id helper correctly resolves partner_id from user's org or store
get_scoped_organization_ids properly expands scope for org_admin when they belong to a partner
create_organization auto-links partner_id when created by partner admin
partner_billing router properly scopes client records by partner for org_admins
Frontend partner-billing.tsx correctly shows/hides platform billing section based on super_admin role
seed_data_creation: Test created/cleaned up TEST_ prefixed orgs, stores, and billing records
context_for_next_testing_agent: Partner billing and partner admin access features fully working. Backend: (1) Partner org_admin can list all partner-linked orgs, (2) Create new orgs auto-linked to partner, (3) Create stores that inherit partner_id from org, (4) Cannot create stores outside their partner scope. Super admin can configure platform billing per partner and view billing summary. Frontend: White Label Partners page has Billing button, Partner Billing page shows 3 sections - Summary, Platform Billing, Client Billing Records.

backend.partner_admin_list_orgs: PASS - Partner admin sees all partner-linked orgs
backend.partner_admin_create_org: PASS - New orgs auto-linked to partner_id
backend.partner_admin_create_store: PASS - Stores inherit partner_id from org
backend.partner_admin_blocked_outside_partner: PASS - Cannot create stores in non-partner orgs
backend.partner_admin_list_stores: PASS - Only sees stores in partner orgs
backend.non_super_admin_blocked_platform_billing: PASS - 403 for partner admin viewing platform billing
backend.partner_admin_create_client_record: PASS - partner_id auto-set from user's org
backend.client_records_scoped_to_partner: PASS - GET returns only partner's records
backend.super_admin_sees_all_records: PASS - Super admin sees all billing records

frontend.white_label_page_billing_button: PASS - Each partner card shows Billing button with receipt icon
frontend.partner_summary_section: PASS - Shows Orgs, Stores, Seats, Est/mo counts
frontend.platform_billing_section: PASS - Shows Model, Rate, Carrier config (super admin only)
frontend.client_billing_section: PASS - Shows client billing records with delete button
